name: Sesame Yam Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil or bake yams until soft but not mushy. Let cool or refrigerate overnight.
2. Peel and cut yams into pieces about 2 inches x 1/2 inch x 1/2 inch.
3. Roll yam sticks in sesame seeds, pressing to make the seeds stick.
4. Saute in oil for one minute on each side, then drain and cool.
5. Serve cool or broil briefly to crisp the sticks and serve hot.
